a:r.a:t: Annual Opex for MR Product Tankers ($M, ‘25E, excludes D&A and voyage expenses)
Specific Company Comps for Annual MR Opex ($M, ’25E)

Note: (1) OSG opex found by subtracting ‘23 Jones Act product tanker “Vessel Operating Contribution” from Time Charter Earnings in 2023, adding pro rata dry-dock expense, dividing by relevant days, and inflating at ~2% CAGR from 2023-2025; 2023 was the last full year of OSG’s publicly-reported results due to Saltchuk taking OSG private in 2024; (2) Annual opex found by adding Drewry dry-dock costs for 10-year old vessels to reported vessel operating expenses as companies shown capitalize dry-dock expenses and do not report MR-specific dry-dock expenses | Source:
; S&P Maritime Intelligence Risk Suite; Clarksons; Market participant feedback
Lower bound represents MARAD analysis; upper bound represents carrier feedback to MARAD
Note: MR tankers shown given lack of LR1 product tankers in US-flagged fleet
JM: Match boxes to chart bar colors where appropriate
JM: Include currency, size (K, M, B), and real vs. nominal – for real, include year e.g., “’25E”; for nominal, state “nominal”)
JM: Put data rows in circles – if shaded, add in legend up top explaining the color
JM: Tie notes to the page using superscript numbers; do not tie sources
JM: Logos should be approximately the same size
JM: round down if decimal <0.5; round up if decimal >0.5
JM: Use 1-pt dashed lines to separate content on a page
JM: Upper bound ranges generally hashed or dotted, but subject to content
JM: If multiple segments in a bar, include segment values
